name: Rigatoni Alla Carbonara
recipeInstructions:
1. FINELY DICE THE PANCETTA and saute it gently with the onion and chile in the butter and olive oil until the pancetta is rendered and the onion soft, about 10 minutes.
2. DISCARD the chile.
3. BEAT THE EGGS WITH THE 2 CHEESES, 1/2 TEASPOON SALT, SEVERAL GRINDINGS OF BLACK PEPPER AND THE PARSLEY.
4. BRING 4-TO-5 QUARTS OF WATER TO A BOIL.
5. ADD 1 TABLESPON SALT AND PUT IN THE SPAGHETTI.
6. WHEN THE SPAGHETTI IS STILL SLIGHTLY UNDONE, DRAIN IT AND ADD IT TO THE PAN WITH THE PANCETTA.
7. OVER LOW HEAT, TOSHING THOROUGHLY TO COAT THE PASTA WITH THE OIL AND BUTTER.
8. TURN OFF THE HEAT, STIR IN THE EGG- CHEESE MIXTURE AND TOSING VIGOROUSLY.
9. SERVE AT ONCE.
